systems.name: Playable game loop
systems.notes: Movement, interaction, minigames, save/load, and region travel work in sample scope.

systems.name: Museum hub
systems.notes: Central hub with portals to all expedition regions.

systems.name: Expedition regions
systems.notes: Six playable regions with species placement — sample taxa only, not global coverage.

systems.name: Species encounters
systems.notes: Wildlife observation and fossil excavation minigames for region species.

systems.name: Artifact collection
systems.notes: Ethical artifact templates tied to hero species with notebook logging.

systems.name: Lifeling companion
systems.notes: Companion rendering, traits, emotes, and unlock progression.

systems.name: ArchiveDex
systems.notes: 17-tab species entries for sample snapshot; not full Catalogue of Life coverage.

systems.name: Time Atlas
systems.notes: ICS sample units and gates with mock-sample banners; live ICS ingestion blocked.

systems.name: NASA Earth Layer Console
systems.notes: Illustrative NASA layers with visible MOCK SAMPLE banner; real Earthdata ingestion blocked.

systems.name: Global Coverage Matrix
systems.notes: Matrix services and audits for sample scope; not global catalogue completeness.

systems.name: Coverage Dashboard
systems.notes: Dev/admin panel (?dev=1, key G) — labels mock counts separately.

systems.name: Implementation Status Dashboard
systems.notes: Dev/admin panel (?dev=1, key I) showing release readiness and incomplete inventory.

systems.name: Quests
systems.notes: Quest tracking and progress for sample expedition goals.

systems.name: Map
systems.notes: Region travel map for museum-connected biomes.

systems.name: Field notebook
systems.notes: Artifact log and expedition notes.

systems.name: Python data pipeline
systems.notes: uv package, CLI, DuckDB SQL runner, and tests — sample scope validation only.

systems.name: SQL pipeline
systems.notes: Numbered SQL views for bundle validation; not production warehouse.

systems.name: Source snapshot workflow
systems.blockedReason: Full COL/GBIF/IUCN/PBDB downloads not imported; sample snapshots only.
systems.notes: Manifest/checksum workflow documented; large downloads stay external.

systems.name: Catalogue of Life full ingestion
systems.blockedReason: Full Catalogue of Life source snapshot not yet imported.
systems.notes: Sample scope JSON only — never loaded as global catalogue.

systems.name: Bundle generation
systems.notes: generate:bundles and generate:time-atlas produce committed sample bundles.

systems.name: Source provenance
systems.notes: All current provenance flagged isMockData; audits separate mock from verified.

systems.name: CI workflow
systems.notes: GitHub Actions runs typecheck, audits, build, and Python pipeline.

systems.name: Data and coverage audits
systems.notes: TypeScript and Python audits with mock/verified count separation.

systems.name: Documentation
systems.notes: Architecture, coverage, provenance, and release policies documented.

systems.name: Issue templates
systems.notes: GitHub issue templates for data, coverage, and bugs.

systems.name: PR template
systems.notes: Pull request checklist for data and audit changes.

systems.name: Release snapshot policy
systems.notes: Release gates and snapshot manifest policy defined.

systems.name: NASA Earthdata live ingestion
systems.blockedReason: Live NASA Earthdata API ingestion requires credentials and production pipeline.
systems.notes: Ingest scripts are scaffold with mock returns — not production fetchers.

systems.blockedReason: Neotoma API integration not connected for production.
